title: Allow annotations for podman play kube
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind feature

**Description**

When using `podman play kube` allow to specify annotations similarly to `podman run --annotation run.oci.keep_original_groups=1` so full functionality could be utilized.

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out, @vbence!  I like your proposal.  @rhatdan @baude something for interns?
SGTM, you are in charge of one...
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
